title: docs-workflow-jira-ready input
description: Input arguments for the docs-workflow-jira-ready skill.

jql.description: JQL query string used to find candidate tickets.

base_path.description: Workspace base path to check for existing progress files.

label.description: Jira label that marks a ticket as already started.

dry_run.description: Preview results without adding labels or side effects.

add_label.description: Add the tracking label to each returned ticket in Jira.

max_results.description: Maximum number of Jira results to fetch.
